bull.key_assumption: Services growth re-accelerates on a higher attach rate for on-device AI bundles.

base.key_assumption: Hardware replacement stays stable while Services mix expands modestly.

bear.key_assumption: China demand softens and gross margin compresses before AI monetization offsets it.

top_risks: Regulatory pressure on App Store economics

sections.variant_view_q1: The market still values Apple primarily through replacement-cycle volatility even though the Services mix is now large enough to smooth gross profit and working-capital swings more than in prior iPhone downturns.
sections.variant_view_q2: The most credible mind-changing catalyst is not a headline AI launch but a quarter where Services margin and attach-rate data show that on-device AI features convert into paid ecosystem spend.
sections.variant_view_q3: Optionality is concentrated in premium bundle monetization across devices, where Apple can layer AI upgrades onto an installed base it already controls rather than funding third-party distribution from scratch.

precision_risks.mechanism: A 5-pt volume miss in Greater China lowers hardware absorption and trims Services cross-sell.
precision_risks.mitigation: Track channel inventory and regional pricing actions.

precision_risks.mechanism: Commission pressure narrows high-margin Services contribution and compresses blended gross margin.
precision_risks.mitigation: Watch policy scope and alternative billing adoption.

precision_risks.mechanism: If AI features stay free without raising hardware ASPs or bundle ARPU, valuation upside from ecosystem monetization fades.
precision_risks.mitigation: Monitor paid feature packaging and retention.

sections.portfolio_strategy: Treat the name as a quality compounder where position sizing should expand only if Services and cash conversion continue to offset hardware cyclicality.
what_would_make_me_wrong: Services growth slips below low double digits for two consecutive quarters.
China channel inventory builds without offsetting margin support elsewhere.
AI feature launches fail to improve attach rates or upgrade intent.

macro_context.narrative: Structured FRED macro data unavailable in this fixture; qualitative rate sensitivity only.

factors.impact: Higher discount rates compress long-duration equity multiples.
